notes: Primero (primeroIMS) documents its REST API v2 as markdown in the GitHub repo (doc/api) rather than a machine spec. Authored OpenAPI 3.0 by hand. Exact endpoint paths for cases, case referrals (list under /cases/{id}/referrals, bulk create under /cases/referrals, update under /cases/{id}/referrals/{id}), tokens, forms, lookups and locations were extracted from the adaptor dist source; case list response shape confirmed from the cases/get.md doc. Host is instance-specific.
